properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here we are all together as we sing a song our song joyfully; Here we are joined together, as we pray we’ll always be.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Join we now as friends And celebrate the unity we share, all as one Keep the fire burning, kindle it with care And we’ll all join in & sing chorus

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let us make this world an alleluia, Let us make this world a better place Keep a smile handy, lend a helping hand And we’ll all join in & sing chorus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Glorify our God with all our voices Show him we are sincere by all our deeds Shout the joys of freedom everywhere Let us all join in and sing.
